programmes.show_description: Jaw Dropper. Dr. Lee and Lyndsey help David with a jaw lump and Carla's bulge raises concern. James wants 70 skin tags removed so he is ready for beach season. S1, Ep6
Pain In The Neck. John fears the large lump on his neck could become so big that it may eventually suffocate him. Shoshana is depressed because of the big growth on her forehead. S3, Ep5
Karina's Story. Unable to care for herself, Karina's weight has placed a burden on her parents. Is it too late for Karina to repair the damage to her body? S6, Ep5

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Show That Lets It Go. Vicky is crushed when the dream dress she saw online is not what she hoped, so David comes to the rescue! Rachel wants a boho frock but will it suit her? S2, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Opinionated Entourage Show. Bride Melanie falls for a gown with sleeves and limited cleavage - but her outspoken entourage disagrees! And Nicola's family scuppers her selections! S2, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Fifty Shades Of Bridal. Pink-mad Fiona wants a slender gown, but Mum prefers a princess style. Louise craves a grey wedding gown, but will mum think it's more dirty than dreamy? S2, Ep8

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Jet Setters Show. Megan and Whitney hunt frocks for their Palm Springs ceremony. Sabrina seeks a gown for her Italian nuptials. Maryam's dress is blinged for her Vegas wedding! S2, Ep9
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Molly Needs A Number. When Molly is overwhelmed with Thanksgiving preparations and wedding planning, she asks Mike to help, with mixed results. S2, Ep10
Christmas Break. When Molly gets disappointing news at work, she is thrown into a funk that threatens to ruin Christmas. S2, Ep11
Victoria Can't Drive. When Victoria is arrested for various driving violations, Molly and Joyce ask Mike to help spring her from jail. S2, Ep13
Teenager Soup. Sheldon fakes being sick to avoid a swim test at school. Meanwhile, Dr. Sturgis spies on Meemaw's new boyfriend. S3, Ep10
A Live Chicken. George and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household while Mary plans Pastor Jeff's wedding. S3, Ep11
Body Glitter, Mall Safety Kit. Sheldon catches a struggling Paige shoplifting. Meanwhile, George Sr. is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of chores. S3, Ep12
The Friendship Turbulence. Things turn rocky between Sheldon and Wolowitz, and Bernadette steps in to mediate. Penny is offered a movie role that may prove embarrassing. S7, Ep17
The Mommy Observation. Sheldon's visit to see his mummy forces him to start addressing a new reality. The gang speculate about where they might be in 20 years. S7, Ep18
The Indecision Amalgamation. Raj wrestles with dating two women at the same time, Penny is offered a part in a trashy movie, and Sheldon can't decide between two gaming systems. S7, Ep19
The Relationship Diremption. Raj and Howard double-date, and the latter is flushed with embarrassment after Raj's girlfriend reveals a secret she knows about Howard. S7, Ep20
Anything Can Happen Recurrence. Leonard reinstates Anything Can Happen Thursday, and Sheldon attempts something spontaneous. Raj requests help from Howard in prepping for a date. S7, Ep21
The Proton Transmogrification. Sheldon receives counselling from his childhood TV idol, while Penny and Leonard reach a relationship milestone and turn it into a competition. S7, Ep22
The Gorilla Dissolution. A trying day at the movie shoot makes Penny question her life choices. Caring for a bedridden Mrs. Wolowitz is a challenge for Howard and Bernadette. S7, Ep23
The Status Quo Combustion. Sheldon gets caught up in all the life-altering changes going on around him and considers a monumental move. Raj and Emily take it to the next level. S7, Ep24
Joyce's Choices. Joyce drives Vince crazy with jealousy when she agrees to have dinner with her ex-boyfriend. S2, Ep14
Valentine Piggyback. When Mike realises he forgot to make Valentine's Day dinner reservations with Molly, he crashes Carl's elaborate holiday plans with his girlfriend. S2, Ep15
Surprise. Molly throws a surprise birthday party for Mike. Meanwhile, Samuel dates a girl he met through an online dating service. S2, Ep16
Contracts, Rules. George and Georgie go camping with Meemaw's new boyfriend, Dale, but things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend tags along. S3, Ep13
A Slump, A Cross. Sheldon and Georgie bond over a money-making opportunity. Meanwhile, Mary is concerned when Missy misuses religion. S3, Ep14
A Boyfriend's Ex-Wife. Meemaw meets Dale's ex-wife, while Sheldon is forced to work on a group project with reluctant college students. S3, Ep15
The Locomotion Interruption. Amy and Leonard take a road trip, Penny has an interview at Bernadette's company, and Howard has issues with Stuart's relationship with his mum. S8, Ep1
The Junior Professor Solution. Howard signs up to take Sheldon's class, and tensions between Penny and Bernadette give Amy an opportunity to play one against the other. S8, Ep2
The First Pitch Insufficiency. NASA asks Wolowitz to throw the first pitch at an Angels baseball game. And Sheldon says that he and Amy are a better couple than Leonard and Penny. S8, Ep3
The Hook-Up Reverberation. Raj's girlfriend gives Penny the cold shoulder after he tells her about their history, and the guys consider buying into Stuart's comic-book emporium. S8, Ep4
The Focus Attenuation. Amy and Bernadette accuse Penny of becoming a party pooper. And the guys brainstorm about inventing something cool. S8, Ep5
The Expedition Approximation. Sheldon and Raj go on an expedition that turns into a test of how long before they get under each other's skin. Leonard and Penny argue about money. S8, Ep6
Misinterpretation Agitation. Penny's sales pitch leaves a doctor-client smitten and the guys help her deal with it, and Bernadette and Amy debate female scientists and sexuality. S8, Ep7
The Prom Equivalency. Amy and Bernadette organise a prom to be held atop the guys' apartment complex, but Sheldon is leery of all the prom pomp, circumstance and romancing. S8, Ep8
Use Caution Opening Overhead Bins. Emma's secret leaves her future with Ziad in jeopardy, Forrest plans a special day for Sheena, and Elise readies to meet her boyfriend, Joshua. S8, Ep11
Best friends and comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe are visiting locations with the most hilarious, baffling and terribly bad reviews.
Snitch V. Deadbeat. Mandy has to help Meemaw collect money from her dad when he loses some bets, while Georgie tries to intervene. S1, Ep19
Ladies Love Brunch. Georgie tries to juggle his mum, his mother-in-law and Mandy on Mother's Day. Meanwhile, Audrey wants to meet Connor's girlfriend. S1, Ep20
Cyster Cyster. Twins Tracie and Stacie have numerous matching bumps on their heads that sometimes leak. Matt, a former Marine, has a large recurring lump in his armpit. S3, Ep6
Split Decision. Shakisaha split her left earlobe after stretching it with gauges. Mike is a tough guy with a soft bump on his head and Dania's rhinophyma kept her from enjoying life. S3, Ep7
Lisa's Story. Lisa's struggle with weight worsened after witnessing her brother's murder. Now, she must lose the weight or never see her grandchildren grow up. S6, Ep7

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Bridal Blur Show. Claire wants a gown for her big day - will she find it in time? Lydia has tried on over 100 dresses! Will Confetti & Lace be the last stop on her dress quest? S2, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Style Wars Show. What happens when a bride's taste in frocks differs from her entourage? It's style wars! Sparks fly when Rachel falls for a slinky sheath and mum disapproves. S2, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress Lancashire
programmes.show_description: A Very Special Dress Hunt. Girly bride Evie always dreamed of a pink princess dress, but her top choice is twice her budget. And, Gok helps a police officer bride visualise her gown. S1, Ep3
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Quirky Eggheads. After Dr. Sturgis experiences a nervous breakdown, Mary worries Sheldon is headed down a similar path. Georgie finds he has a knack for sales. S3, Ep1
Broom Closet. Without Dr. Sturgis's university class, Sheldon takes his education into his own hands. Mary helps Pastor Jeff avoid temptation with his girlfriend. S3, Ep2
An Entrepreneurialist. Sheldon leaves town after a fight with Meemaw and his parents. Meanwhile, Georgie tries to impress Veronica with his new business venture. S3, Ep3
Hobbitses, Physicses. Sheldon's obsession with The Lord of the Rings leads to an unhealthy habit. Missy asks her dad to teach her how to play catch. S3, Ep4
Pineapple And Male Friendship. After being released from the psychiatric hospital, Dr. Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw. S3, Ep5
A Parasol And A Hell Of An Arm. A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meanwhile, Meemaw struggles after her breakup with Dr. Sturgis. S3, Ep6
Snitch V. Deadbeat. Mandy has to help Meemaw collect money from her dad when he loses some bets, while Georgie tries to intervene. S1, Ep19
Ladies Love Brunch. Georgie tries to juggle his mum, his mother-in-law and Mandy on Mother's Day. Meanwhile, Audrey wants to meet Connor's girlfriend. S1, Ep20
The Monster Isolation. After a terrible date, Raj vows to never leave his apartment again. Meanwhile, Penny actually impresses Sheldon with her acting skills. S6, Ep17
Contractual Obligation Implementation. Leonard, Sheldon and Howard try to advance the cause of women in science by speaking with junior high girls about their future careers. S6, Ep18
The Closet Reconfiguration. When Howard finds a letter from his father, he's forced to confront his past. And Leonard and Penny throw a grown-up cocktail party at the apartment. S6, Ep19
The Tenure Turbulence. Let the battle begin! Leonard, Sheldon and Raj fight for tenure at the University - and the competition heats up when the girls get involved! S6, Ep20
The Closure Alternative. After one of his favourite TV shows gets cancelled too soon, Sheldon feels lost, so Amy tries to help him get over his compulsive need for closure. S6, Ep21
The Proton Resurgence. Leonard and Sheldon hire Professor Proton, the host of their favourite childhood TV show, to perform. Raj leaves his dog with Howard and Bernadette. S6, Ep22
The Love Spell Potential. When the girls' trip to Vegas falls through, the guys invite them to a Dungeons & Dragons date. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy go on an awkward date. S6, Ep23
The Bon Voyage Reaction. When Leonard is offered an exciting new job opportunity overseas, Sheldon grows jealous. Raj pushes Lucy a little too far in their relationship. S6, Ep24
The Hofstadter Insufficiency. Leonard is away at sea, so Sheldon and Penny spend time together and spill some revealing secrets. Howard comes to Raj's aid after a breakup. S7, Ep1
The Deception Verification. Leonard returns from his expedition and finds things chilly between him and Sheldon, and Howard faces questions about his masculinity. S7, Ep2
The Scavenger Vortex. Raj puts together a scientific scavenger hunt that turns into serious, cutthroat competition that brings out the best - and the worst - in the gang. S7, Ep3
The Raiders Minimization. Amy ruins one of Sheldon's favourite films. Leonard discovers how to get Penny to do his bidding. Raj and Stuart get creative with dating profiles. S7, Ep4
The Workplace Proximity. Amy takes a job at Sheldon's university, putting their relationship to the test. Howard ends up sleeping on Raj's couch after a fight with Bernadette. S7, Ep5
The Romance Resonance. Sheldon fears his major scientific breakthrough may haunt him for the rest of his career. Howard makes a grand romantic gesture to Bernadette. S7, Ep6
The Proton Displacement. When Sheldon's childhood hero, Professor Proton, seeks Leonard's help with an experiment, Sheldon decides to befriend another TV science guy. S7, Ep7
The Itchy Brain Simulation. Leonard fails to stop Sheldon from overreacting after a past slight comes to light, and Penny has a run-in with Raj's former girlfriend Lucy. S7, Ep8
The Thanksgiving Decoupling. Howard's mother has a say when he and Bernadette host Thanksgiving dinner for the gang. Penny and Leonard must deal with a mistake from her past. S7, Ep9
The Discovery Dissipation. Amy and Leonard try to help Sheldon when his accidental scientific discovery is disproved. Howard and Bernadette open their home to Raj for a week. S7, Ep10
The Cooper Extraction. With Sheldon in Texas, the gang decorates for Christmas, and they each contemplate if they would have had a wonderful life if they'd never met him. S7, Ep11
The Hesitation Ramification. Penny turns to Leonard after her guest appearance doesn't turn out well. Sheldon works on his sense of humour, and Raj practices talking to girls. S7, Ep12
Dara Ó Briain introduces topical chat and hilarious games with Rhys James, Scott Bennett, Ed Byrne, Hugh Dennis, Sara Pascoe and Katherine Ryan. S1, Ep8
Street-smart Detroit cop Axel Foley is back in L.A. on a mission to find the man who killed his boss in Detroit, aided by old pal Rosewood.
